species: The fungal pathogen Aspergillus fumigatus is frequently cultured from the sputum of cystic fibrosis (CF) patients along with the bacterium Pseudomonas aeruginosa.
cell_type: A. fumigatus conidia (5×105 ml−1) were added to Czapek-Dox liquid media...
disease_state: the sputum of cystic fibrosis (CF) patients...
sample_source: frequently cultured from the sputum of cystic fibrosis (CF) patients...
cell_line: A. fumigatus (ATCC 26933) was grown on Sabouraud dextrose agar...
strain: P. aeruginosa (PAO1) was cultivated on nutrient agar...
